name: Pakistan
summary: Day 68 Wednesday. **PAKISTAN MEDIATION DELIVERED THE STRUCTURAL OFF-RAMP — TRUMP'S MAY 5 PROJECT FREEDOM PAUSE EXPLICITLY CITED 'PAKISTAN'S REQUEST' AS DRIVER.** Trump's Truth Social post named Pakistan as the channel through which 'Great Progress' was made toward a 'Complete and Final Agreement' with Iran's representatives. This is the highest-profile validation of Pakistan's mediator role since Day 1 of the crisis: the Pakistan track now has documented operational outcomes (US convoy paused, kinetic-restart contained to one cycle, both sides reverted to negotiation framing within 24h). Architecture: Pakistan PRIMARY, Qatar/Egypt/Turkey/Oman supporting/parallel; Russia uranium-custodian track confirmed sidelined (Kremlin Peskov May 5: 'not currently on the negotiating table'). The yesterday's-watching-trigger 'Pakistan-brokered Iranian unified proposal delivered to US within 21 days' is structurally RESOLVED-YES on the May 5 pause framework — though the substance of any 'Complete and Final Agreement' remains REPORTED only (Trump's framing of progress, not a confirmed agreement). New trigger watching: 'Pakistan-mediated track delivers Iran formal Hormuz reopening within 14-21 days' (by 2026-05-26). The Pakistan + Saudi security partnership context (April activation) provides the bilateral architecture that makes Trump's 'Pakistan request' credible — Munir-Sharif channel verified-functional through the May 4-5 stress.
